cards.name: Fungal Warrior
cards.abilityDescription: Each attack: if the current enemy is poisoned, gain +25% ATK permanently

cards.name: Crimson Samurai
cards.abilityDescription: When attacked, have a 40% chance to counterattack for 75% of his own ATK and inflict Bleed (deals 8% MAX HP for 3 turns)

cards.name: Paladin Guardian
cards.abilityDescription: At battle start: gives the last 2 allies in party a full-absorb shield

cards.name: Sand Worm
cards.abilityDescription: Dodges the first incoming hit entirely. The next attack deals +10% of the dodged damage as bonus damage

cards.name: Harbinger of Ruin
cards.abilityDescription: Each hit grants +15% damage reduction (cap 50%). Any status effect applied to this card is reflected back to the attacker.

cards.name: Wendigo
cards.abilityDescription: Targets the lowest-HP enemy card. Gains +15% damage per enemy slot skipped on this attack

cards.name: Warrior Skeleton
cards.abilityDescription: Revives once at 20% HP with +50% ATK permanently upon death

cards.name: Grave Sentinel
cards.abilityDescription: Upon death, deals damage equal to MAX HP to the current enemy

cards.name: Bone Collector
cards.abilityDescription: Gain 15% of allies' MAX HP and 5% of allies' ATK for each ally that has died before this card comes into play

cards.name: Serpent
cards.abilityDescription: Upon entry, stun the active enemy for 1 turn. If a stunned enemy is defeated, poison the next enemy. Gain 15% lifesteal against poisoned enemies.

cards.name: Spirit Caller
cards.abilityDescription: Upon death: brings back a random fallen ally at 40% HP (once per battle)

cards.name: Dragon
cards.abilityDescription: Absorbs 20% of a defeated enemy's MAX HP and ATK upon killing them

cards.name: Dread Knight
cards.abilityDescription: Permanently makes the enemy take 30% more damage from all sources

cards.name: Lunar Sovereign
cards.abilityDescription: 35% chance per hit to madden the enemy (they attack themselves next turn). Two consecutive madness procs heal Lunar Sovereign for 50% of the self-damage and grant +10% ATK.

cards.name: Life Tree
cards.abilityDescription: On entry: inflicts Liveliness on all enemies. When a Liveliness-marked enemy dies, the card that killed it gains a shield worth 35% of this Life Tree's MAX HP

cards.name: Sand Wraith
cards.abilityDescription: At battle start: all allies gain 15% dodge and stun immunity while Sand Wraith is alive, but deal 25% less damage.

cards.name: Deacon
cards.abilityDescription: Self-stun on 1st turn. On 2nd turn: deal 25% ATK to all enemies and inflict Blinding Light for 2 turns (enemies take 20% more damage)

cards.name: Glimmer Wing
cards.abilityDescription: 30% chance each attack to deal 2x damage and heal 15% of own MAX HP

cards.name: Iron Titan
cards.abilityDescription: Stores 30% of damage taken. Every 3 turns: next attack deals stored damage as bonus, then gains a shield equal to 50% of damage stored

cards.name: Crystal Titan
cards.abilityDescription: On entry, gain a shield worth 50% of max HP. When fully broken, steal the active enemy's ability but receive 30% more damage until death.
